sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f: position size = (optimal_f × equity) / |worst_case_loss|. Example given: f=0.2 yields ~1 contract per $2,750 equity when worst-case loss = -$550. Solve Equation (4.16) across scenario bins to derive optimal f for your specific historical distribution.

source_rule_text: Size positions using optimal f, betting a fixed fraction of equity based on worst-case loss from historical scenarios to maximize long-run geometric growth
